methodology: Token counts via tiktoken cl100k_base. cl100k_base is GPT-4's BPE tokenizer; Claude's tokenizer is also BPE with similar vocabulary scale, so counts are within ~5–10% of what Claude actually sees. Engine subprocess output is what enters Claude's context — the engine itself does NOT. Sessions assume both tiers installed concurrently.

Small.description: Notes folder with CLAUDE.md, ~34 root files

Medium.description: React Native app, no CLAUDE.md, ~30 files

XL.description: Skills Curator's own repo: Python + skill files + tests + docs
